behavior: A deliberate foliage gleaner, moving slowly through tree branches to pick insects from leaves and twigs.
field_marks: Bright yellow spectacles: a complete eyering joined to yellow lores.
Unstreaked, vivid yellow throat and upper breast.
Olive-green head and upperparts with a contrasting gray rump.
Two crisp white wingbars on dark gray wings.
Small, sturdy dark bill with a subtly hooked tip.
habitat: Open deciduous woodland and forest edges; also uses mixed deciduous forest, wooded gaps, and shrubby woodland edges.
